modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access books and articles not available at USD Library

full_description_text:  
Trying to access an article.  
It's not available at USD Library.  
Wegner Library and interlibrary loan options are not working.  
Need help getting this article.
